api_bfl_flux1_expand_image: Upload an image to expand its canvas using Flux.1. Generate an outpainted image with extended content.
api_bfl_flux_1_kontext_max_image: Edit images with Flux.1 Kontext max image.
api_bfl_flux_1_kontext_multiple_images_i: Input multiple images and edit them with Flux.1 Kontext.
api_bfl_flux_1_kontext_pro_image: Edit images with Flux.1 Kontext pro image.
api_bfl_flux_pro_t2i: Generate images with excellent prompt following and visual quality using FLUX.1 Pro.
api_bytedance_seedream_5_0_lite_image_ed: Upload an image and a text prompt to edit it. Generate a modified image where the details align with your instructions.
api_elevenlabs_speech_to_speech: Upload a source audio file to apply a new voice tone or clone a different voice, generating a modified audio output.
api_elevenLabs_speech_to_text: Upload an audio or video file to transcribe its speech into accurate, editable text.
api_elevenlabs_text_to_dialogue: Input text and select a voice profile to generate a high-quality, emotionally expressive audio dialogue.
api_elevenlabs_text_to_sound_effects: Input a text prompt to generate custom sound effects and ambient audio.
api_elevenlabs_text_to_speech: Input text to generate speech with ultra-realistic voices, or upload a voice sample to clone it for synthesis.
api_elevenlabs_voice_isolation: Upload an audio file containing background noise. Use the ElevenLabs API to isolate and output a clean voice track.
api_flux2: Generate up to 4MP photorealistic images with multi-reference consistency and professional text rendering.
api_google_nano_banana2_image_edit: Upload an image and a text prompt to edit it. Generate a new image that modifies the original based on your instructions, maintaining subject consistency and high visual fidelity.
api_ideogram_v3_t2i: Generate professional-quality images with excellent prompt alignment, photorealism, and text rendering using Ideogram V3.
api_kling_flf: Generate videos through controlling the first and last frames.
api_kling_i2v: Generate videos with excellent prompt adherence for actions, expressions, and camera movements using Kling.
api_kling_motion_control3: Upload a character image and a motion reference video. Generate a new video where your character performs the actions from the reference, with enhanced facial consistency using optional element binding.
api_kling_o3_flf2v: Upload reference images or specify start and end frames. Generate a video with precise semantic control, longer duration, and improved narrative coherence.
api_kling_o3_i2v: Upload a reference image and optional audio or text prompt. Generate a character-consistent video with native audio output and precise storyboard control.
api_kling_o3_image: Upload up to 10 reference images to guide the synthesis. Generate a new image using the Kling O3 model based on your provided visual inputs.
api_kling_o3_video_edit: Upload a video and a reference image to edit with Kling O3. Generate a professionally edited video with precise subject editing, scene composition, and native audio-visual synchronization.
api_kling_omni_edit_video: Edit videos with natural language commands, featuring video reference mode for quick generation of high-quality style transfers, element additions, and background modifications.
api_kling_omni_i2v: Transform static images into dynamic videos with Kling O1. Add motion, camera movements, and life to your images using text prompts.
api_kling_omni_image: Generate high-quality images from text prompts using Kling O1, with support for up to 10 reference images to guide style and content. Features flexible aspect ratios and 1K/2K resolution options.
api_kling_omni_t2v: Generate videos from text descriptions using Kling O1. Create dynamic video content with natural language prompts.
api_kling_omni_v2v: Transform videos with Kling O1. Edit video content, change styles, or replace characters using text prompts and reference images.
api_kling_v3_flf2v: Input a first and last frame image to generate a continuous video sequence with multi-shot generation, precise element control, and support for multilingual prompts.
api_kling_v3_t2i: Generate an image from a text prompt using the Kling 3.0 model. Input your descriptive text to receive a high-quality, prompt-accurate visual output.
api_kling_v3_video: Input text or image prompts to generate 15-second video sequences with multi-shot compositions, complex camera movements, and consistent subjects.
api_ltxv_image_to_video: Transform static images into dynamic videos with LTX-2 Pro. Generate cinematic video sequences with natural motion, synchronized audio, and support for up to 4K resolution at 50fps.
api_ltxv_text_to_video: Generate high-quality videos from text prompts using Lightricks LTX-2 with synchronized audio. Supports up to 4K resolution at 50fps with Fast, Pro, and Ultra modes for various production needs.
api_magnific_image_relight: Upload a source image and a reference lighting image. Generate a relit version of your source image, applying the lighting conditions from the reference.
api_magnific_image_style_transfer: Upload a target image and a style reference image. Generate a new image that merges the artistic style of the reference with the structure of your target.
api_magnific_image_upscale_creative: Upload an image and set the magnification level. Generate an upscaled version of your image with support for up to 16x enlargement.
api_magnific_image_upscale_precise: Upload an image to precisely upscale it using the Magnific model, generating a high-resolution version with enhanced detail.
api_magnific_skin_enhancer: Enhance skin and overall image quality by uploading your image and selecting a preset to adjust lighting, color grading, and realism.
api_meshy_image_to_model: Upload an image and generate a 3D model with Meshy 6. Create characters, objects, or mechanical parts with production-quality geometry and clean topology.
api_meshy_multi_image_to_model: Create high-quality 3D models from multiple images using Meshy 6. More photos mean better detail capture, accurate proportions, and cleaner mesh structure.
api_meshy_text_to_model: Generate high-quality 3D models from text prompts using Meshy 6. Create characters with refined geometry, mechanical objects with sharp edges, or game-ready low-poly assets.
api_nano_banana_pro: Nano-banana Pro (Gemini 3.0 Pro Image) - Studio-quality 4K image generation and editing with enhanced text rendering and character consistency.
api_runway_first_last_frame: Generate smooth video transitions between two keyframes with Runway's precision.
api_runway_gen3a_turbo_image_to_video: Generate cinematic videos from static images using Runway Gen3a Turbo.
api_runway_gen4_turo_image_to_video: Generate dynamic videos from images using Runway Gen4 Turbo.
api_runway_reference_to_image: Generate new images based on reference styles and compositions with Runway's AI.
api_runway_text_to_image: Generate high-quality images from text prompts using Runway's AI model.
api_topaz_image_enhance: Professional image enhancement using Topaz's Reimagine model with face enhancement and detail restoration.
api_topaz_starlight_precise25: Upload a video to enhance its resolution using the Topaz Starlight Precise 2.5 model. This workflow produces sharper 4K output with reduced artifacts compared to previous versions.
api_topaz_video_enhance: Enhance videos with Topaz AI. Supports resolution upscaling using Starlight (Astra) Fast model and frame interpolation with apo-8 model.
api_veo3: Generate high-quality 8-second videos from text prompts or images using Google's advanced Veo 3 API. Features audio generation, prompt enhancement, and dual model options for speed or quality.
api_wan2_6_i2v: Transform images into high-quality videos with enhanced image quality, smoother motion, 1080P resolution support, and natural movement generation for professional results.
api_wan2_6_t2v: Generate high-quality videos from text prompts with enhanced image quality, smoother motion, 1080P resolution support, and improved prompt understanding for natural, professional results.
api_wan_image_to_video: Transform images into videos with synchronized audio, enhanced motion, and superior quality.
api_wan_text_to_image: Generate images with excellent prompt following and visual quality using FLUX.1 Pro.
api_wan_text_to_video: Generate videos with synchronized audio, enhanced motion, and superior quality.
image_flux.1_fill_dev_OneReward: Supports various tasks such as image inpainting, outpainting, and object removal by bytedance-research team
image_flux2: Generate photorealistic images with multi-reference consistency and professional text rendering.
image_flux2_fp8: Create product mockups by applying design patterns to packaging, mugs, and other products using multi-reference consistency.
image_flux2_klein_9b_kv_image_edit: Upload reference images and a text prompt. Generate multiple edited images using cached image data for faster processing.
image_flux2_klein_image_edit_9b_base: BFL undistilled foundation model. Maximum flexibility and control. Great for fine-tuning.
image_flux2_klein_image_edit_9b_distille: BFL distilled model. Outstanding quality at sub-second speed. Great for real-time generation while retaining quality. Marketing launch will focus on this model.
image_flux2_klein_text_to_image: BFL distilled model. Outstanding quality at sub-second speed. Great for real-time generation while retaining quality. Marketing launch will focus on this model.
image_flux2_text_to_image: Text-to-image with enhanced lighting, materials, and realistic details.
image_flux2_text_to_image_9b: BFL distilled model. Outstanding quality at sub-second speed. Great for real-time generation while retaining quality. Marketing launch will focus on this model.
image_qwen_image: Generate images with exceptional multilingual text rendering and editing capabilities using Qwen-Image's 20B MMDiT model.
image_qwen_Image_2512: Text-to-image model with enhanced human realism, finer natural details for landscapes and animal fur, and improved text rendering with accurate layout and multimodal composition.
image_qwen_Image_2512_controlnet: Upload an image and select a control type from Canny, HED, Depth, Pose, MLSD, Scribble, or Grayscale. Generate a new image guided by the chosen structural condition.
image_qwen_image_2512_with_2steps_lora: Qwen-Image 2512 Image generation with 2-steps Turbo LoRA. Input your text prompt to quickly produce a result, though some quality is sacrificed for speed.
image_qwen_image_edit_2511: Replace materials in objects (e.g., furniture) by combining reference images with Qwen-Image-Edit-2511.
image_z_image: Foundation for creative freedom. Diverse aesthetics with exceptional photorealistic quality; ideal for fine-tuning; responsive to negative prompts; high generation diversity.
image_z_image_turbo: An Efficient Image Generation Foundation Model with Single-Stream Diffusion Transformer, supports English & Chinese.
image_z_image_turbo_fun_union_controlnet: Multi-control ControlNet supporting Canny, HED, Depth, Pose, and MLSD for Z-Image-Turbo.
video-wan21_scail: One-Touch SCAIL Pose Control based on the composition of the Reference Image
video_ltx2_3_flf2v: Upload a starting image to generate a video sequence. The workflow creates a short video with consistent style and motion, beginning with your provided frame.
video_ltx2_3_i2v: Upload an image to generate a video with improved motion consistency and fine details, including enhanced support for portrait formats and audio quality.
video_ltx2_3_ia2v: Upload an image and an audio file to generate a high-quality video with synchronized lip movements using LTX-2.3.
video_ltx2_3_t2v: Generate a video from a text prompt, optionally using an image for reference. Receive a high-quality video with improved motion, audio, and detail, optimized for portrait or landscape formats.
video_ltx2_canny_to_video: Generate high-quality videos from edge detection (Canny) guidance with synchronized audio-video generation using LTX-2. Features precise edge control, structural consistency, and efficient performance.
video_ltx2_depth_to_video: Generate high-quality videos from depth maps with synchronized audio-video generation using LTX-2. Features precise depth control, spatial awareness, and efficient performance.
video_ltx_2_audio_to_video: Upload an audio file and a starting image frame. Generate a video synchronized to the audio using the LTX-2 model.
video_wan2_1_infinitetalk: Upload a source Image and target audio. Generate a full-body dubbed video with synchronized motion while preserving the original identity, background, and camera movement.
video_wan2_2_14B_animate: Unified character animation and replacement framework with precise motion and expression replication.
video_wan2_2_14B_flf2v: Generate smooth video transitions by defining start and end frames.
video_wan2_2_14B_fun_camera: Generate videos with camera motion controls including pan, zoom, and rotation using Wan 2.2 Fun Camera Control.
video_wan2_2_14B_fun_control: Generate videos guided by pose, depth, and edge controls using Wan 2.2 Fun Control.
video_wan2_2_14B_fun_inpaint: Generate videos from start and end frames using Wan 2.2 Fun Inp.
video_wan2_2_14B_i2v: Transform static images into dynamic videos with precise motion control and style preservation using Wan 2.2.
video_wan2_2_14B_s2v: Transform static images and audio into dynamic videos with perfect synchronization and minute-level generation.
video_wan2_2_14B_t2v: Generate high-quality videos from text prompts with cinematic aesthetic control and dynamic motion generation using Wan 2.2.
video_wan2_2_5B_fun_control: Multi-condition video control with pose, depth, and edge guidance. Compact 5B size for experimental development.
video_wan_vace_14B_ref2v: Create videos that match the style and content of a reference image. Perfect for style-consistent video generation.
video_wan_vace_14B_t2v: Transform text descriptions into high-quality videos. Supports both 480p and 720p with VACE-14B model.
video_wan_vace_14B_v2v: Generate videos by controlling input videos and reference images using Wan VACE.
video_wan_vace_flf2v: Generate smooth video transitions by defining start and end frames. Supports custom keyframe sequences.
video_wan_vace_inpainting: Edit specific regions in videos while preserving surrounding content. Great for object removal or replacement.
video_wan_vace_outpainting: Generate extended videos by expanding video size using Wan VACE outpainting.
flux_canny_model_example: Generate images guided by edge detection using Flux.1 Canny.
flux_depth_lora_example: Generate images guided by depth information using Flux.1 LoRA.
flux_dev_checkpoint_example: Generate images using Flux.1 Dev fp8 quantized version. Suitable for devices with limited VRAM, requires only one model file, but image quality is slightly lower than the full version.
flux_dev_full_text_to_image: Generate high-quality images with Flux Dev full version. Requires larger VRAM and multiple model files, but provides the best prompt following capability and image quality.
flux_fill_inpaint_example: Fill missing parts of images using Flux.1 Fill Inpainting.
flux_fill_outpaint_example: Extend images beyond boundaries using Flux.1 outpainting.
flux_kontext_dev_basic: Smart image editing that keeps characters consistent, edits specific parts without affecting others, and preserves original styles.
flux_redux_model_example: Generate images by transferring style from reference images using Flux.1 Redux.
templates_text_prompt_to_360hdr.app: Prompt an environment and generate a equirectangular hdr image to use as skybox or lookdev in game development.
